metadata.significance: Final surah of Quran, second protective surah, seeks refuge from Satan's whispers

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ

translations.en_sahih: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,
translations.en_yusufali: Say: I seek refuge with the Lord and Cherisher of Mankind,
translations.ms_basmeih: Katakanlah (wahai Muhammad): "Aku berlindung kepada (Allah) Pemulihara sekalian manusia.
"Tuhan yang berhak disembah oleh sekalian manusia,

translations.en_sahih: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -
translations.en_yusufali: From the mischief of the Whisperer (of Evil), who withdraws (after his whisper),-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dari kejahatan pembisik penghasut yang timbul tenggelam, -

translations.en_sahih: Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind -
translations.en_yusufali: (The same) who whispers into the hearts of Mankind,-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Yang melemparkan bisikan dan hasutannya ke dalam hati manusia, -

translations.en_sahih: From among the jinn and mankind."
translations.ms_basmeih: "(Iaitu pembisik dan penghasut) dari kalangan jin dan manusia".
